fundamentals.name: MongoDB, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: MongoDB, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, provides general purpose database platform worldwide. The company offers MongoDB Atlas, a hosted multi-cloud database-as-a-service solution; MongoDB Enterprise Advanced, a commercial database server for enterprise customers to run in the cloud, on-premises, or in a hybrid environment; and Community Server, a free-to-download version of its database, which includes the functionality that developers need to get started with MongoDB. It offers professional services comprising consulting and training. The company was formerly known as 10gen, Inc. and changed its name to MongoDB, Inc. in August 2013. MongoDB, Inc. was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in New York, New York.

judgment.summary: High-growth software company with strong revenue expansion and free cash flow, but currently unprofitable on a net basis and carrying significant debt relative to equity.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 12.1%; next earnings date is 2026-05-28.
positives: Revenue growth 26.7% YoY — robust top-line expansion.
Free cash flow $463.32M TTM — positive cash generation.
Current ratio 4.65 and Quick ratio 4.31 — strong short-term liquidity.
negatives: Profit margin -2.9% and Operating margin 0.0% — currently loss-making.
Return on equity -2.5% and Return on assets -2.4% — negative returns on capital.
Debt/Equity 2.13 — significant leverage on the balance sheet.
Forward P/E 41.58 — valuation reflects high growth expectations.

news.paragraph: MongoDB's stock saw a significant jump after the market close on May 27th, following a strong Q1 earnings release that beat analyst estimates. Multiple analysts maintained their buy ratings and raised price targets, with Canaccord Genuity and Cantor Fitzgerald both increasing their targets to $400, while Rosenblatt maintained a $385 target. The company is set to release its Q1 earnings on May 28th, with strong estimates suggesting continued positive momentum.

headlines.title: MongoDB (MDB) Set to Release Q1 Earnings with Strong Estimates
